title: Ender Elytra
description: Tired of old Elytra? Try this resource pack which adds eyes to Elytra lookd very gorgeous while Flying. Report any issue on my Discord Server.
body:
Tired of old Elytra? Try this resource pack which adds eyes to Elytra lookd very gorgeous while Flying. Report any issue on my Discord Server.
